# spopt

The **spopt** R package provides R-native implementations of spatial
optimization algorithms for regionalization, facility location, and
market analysis. Inspired by [Python’s PySAL
spopt](https://pysal.org/spopt/), the package brings these powerful
algorithms to R users with an sf-first API and a Rust backend for
performance.

Install from r-universe:

``` r
install.packages('spopt', repos = c('https://walkerke.r-universe.dev', 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))
```

For developers who need to build from source (requires Rust), see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Read through these vignettes to learn how to use the package:

- [Getting started with
  **spopt**](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/getting-started.html)

- [Regionalization](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/regionalization.html)

- [Facility location
  problems](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/facility-location.html)

- [Huff model](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/huff-model.html)

- [Travel-time cost
  matrices](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/travel-time-matrices.html)

- [Routing
  optimization](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/articles/routing.html)

## Support and how to learn more

If you find this project useful in your work and would like to ensure
continued development of the package, you can provide support in the
following ways:

- [Chip in some funds to support package development via
  PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/walkerdata/);
- Set up a consulting engagement or workshop through Walker Data to help
  you implement **spopt** in your project. Send a note to
  <kyle@walker-data.com> if you are interested;
- File an issue - or even better, a pull request - at
  <https://github.com/walkerke/spopt-r/issues>.

To stay on top of package updates / new features and to get information
about trainings, [be sure to sign up for the Walker Data mailing list
here](https://walker-data.us15.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=1829a68a5eda3d301119fdcd6&id=c4a53d2961).

# Package index

## Regionalization

Algorithms for spatially-constrained clustering

- [`skater()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/skater.md) :
  SKATER Spatial Clustering
- [`azp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/azp.md) :
  Automatic Zoning Procedure (AZP)
- [`max_p_regions()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/max_p_regions.md)
  : Max-P Regions
- [`spenc()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/spenc.md) :
  Spatially-Encouraged Spectral Clustering (SPENC)
- [`ward_spatial()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/ward_spatial.md)
  : Ward Spatial Clustering

## Facility Location

Optimal facility siting algorithms

- [`p_median()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/p_median.md)
  : P-Median Problem
- [`p_center()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/p_center.md)
  : P-Center Problem
- [`p_dispersion()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/p_dispersion.md)
  : P-Dispersion Problem
- [`lscp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/lscp.md) :
  Location Set Covering Problem (LSCP)
- [`mclp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/mclp.md) :
  Maximum Coverage Location Problem (MCLP)
- [`cflp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/cflp.md) :
  Capacitated Facility Location Problem (CFLP)
- [`frlm()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/frlm.md) : Flow
  Refueling Location Model (FRLM)

## Route Optimization

Single- and multi-vehicle routing

- [`route_tsp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/route_tsp.md)
  : Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP)
- [`route_vrp()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/route_vrp.md)
  : Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP)

## Market Analysis

Market share and competition modeling

- [`huff()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/huff.md) : Huff
  Model for Market Share Analysis

## Utilities

Helper functions for spatial optimization

- [`sp_weights()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/sp_weights.md)
  : Create spatial weights from an sf object
- [`distance_matrix()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/distance_matrix.md)
  : Compute distance matrix between sf objects
- [`second_areal_moment()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/second_areal_moment.md)
  : Second areal moment (i.e., second moment of inertia)
- [`nmi()`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/nmi.md) :
  Normalized moment of inertia (NMI)

## Data

Example datasets

- [`tarrant_travel_times`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/tarrant_travel_times.md)
  : Tarrant County Travel Time Matrix Example Data
- [`delivery_data`](https://walker-data.com/spopt-r/reference/delivery_data.md)
  : Delivery routing data for Fort Worth, TX
